title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese examines how entrepreneur Alex Hormozi leverages AI across his business portfolio through a four-pillar system: data as competitive advantage, voice-first design, workflow decomposition, and compounding effects. The breakdown includes a cautionary example from Hormozi's team at Acquisition.com regarding AI misuse.
